ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: James P Green appearing for trustee. Court asks for clarificationfor services rendered to the trust not to the estate. Oral argument presented by counsel. Matter submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James P. Green appearing for petitioner. This is the trustee's report on waiving of accounting. Attorney's fees issued addressed. Court is considering attorney's fees after the establishment of the trust. Court wants an amended declaration for services render to the trustee. Matter is continued to 10/2. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
